name: rbyte

metadata.name: rbyte
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation: `rbyte` provides a [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org) [`Dataset`](https://pytorch.org/tutorials/beginner/basics/data_tutorial.html) with [`tensorclass`](https://pytorch.org/tensordict/main/reference/tensorclass.html) samples built from multimodal data ## Installation ```bash uv add rbyte [--extra ] ``` See `pyproject.toml` for available extras. ## Examples 1. Install required tools: - [`uv`](https://github.com/astral-sh/uv) - [`just`](https://github.com/casey/just) - [`ytt`](https://carvel.dev/ytt/) 2. Clone: ```shell git clone https://github.com/yaak-ai/rbyte ``` 3. Run: ```shell cd rbyte just notebook examples/nuscenes_mcap.ipynb ``` ## Development 1. Install required tools: - [`uv`](https://github.com/astral-sh/uv) - [`just`](https://github.com/casey/just) - [`ytt`](https://carvel.dev/ytt/) 2. Clone: ```bash git clone https://github.com/yaak-ai/rbyte ``` 3. Run: ```shell cd rbyte just setup ```

classes.name: rbyte.io.yaak.message_iterator.YaakMetadataMessageIterator
documentation: An iterator over a metadata file(-like object) producing messages.

functions.name: rbyte.io.yaak.dataframe_builder.build_yaak_metadata_dataframe
documentation: exposing all kwargs so its cacheable by pipefunc

returns.name: Shaped[Tensor, "c h w"] | Shaped[Tensor, "h w c"]
Shaped[Tensor, "b h w c"] | Shaped[Tensor, "b c h w"]

classes.name: rbyte.sample.rolling_window.RollingWindowSampleBuilder
documentation:
Build samples using rolling windows based on a temporal or integer column.

https://docs.pola.rs/api/python/stable/reference/dataframe/api/polars.DataFrame.rolling

classes.name: rbyte.sample.fixed_window.FixedWindowSampleBuilder
documentation:
Build samples using fixed (potentially overlapping) windows based on a temporal or
integer column.

https://docs.pola.rs/api/python/stable/reference/dataframe/api/polars.DataFrame.group_by_dynamic
